name: Zydus Wellness Limited
summary: Zydus Wellness Limited develops, produces, markets, and distributes health and wellness products in India. The company provides sugar substitute products under the Sugar Free Gold, Sugar Free Natura, and Sugar Free Green brands. It also offers a range of specialty skincare products, such as face washes, facial masks, scrubs, sun blocks, winter care body lotions and creams, cleansers and toners, and soaps under the Everyuth Naturals brand name; and men skincare products under the brand name of EverYuth Menz. In addition, it provides table spread used as an alternative to butter under the Nutralite brand; and nutritional health drink for adults under the Actilife brand. Further, the company offers Complan, a milk-based health food drink; Glucon D, a glucose-based beverage; Nycil, a prickly heat powder brands; and ghee under the Sampriti brand. Zydus Wellness Limited also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Carnation Nutra Analogue Foods Limited and changed its name to Zydus Wellness Limited in January 2009. Zydus Wellness Limited was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Ahmedabad, India. Zydus Wellness Limited is a subsidiary of Cadila Healthcare Limited.
